latin: Homo lusorius, qui se verum spatii custodem esse credebat, in margine lecti stabat. bracchium extendit et magna voce clamavit: 'ad infinitum et ultra!'

questions.prompt: What does the toy believe about himself?
questions.target: That he is a real space ranger
choices: That he is a real space ranger
That he is the leader of all toys

translation: A toy man, who believed he was a real space ranger, stood on the edge of the bed. He extended his arm and shouted loudly: 'To infinity and beyond!'
